culprit_and_motive.value: Castanier commits embezzlement/theft driven by his relationship with Mme. de la Garde
culprit_and_motive.quote: There, on the second floor of a block of buildings which looked out upon some gardens, lived the unconscious cause

red_herring.value: Blanca's mysterious departure creates false trail - appears to be abandonment but may conceal deeper deception
red_herring.quote: She went away without even leaving a line for me, without telling me whither she was going.

social_world.value: Rigid class hierarchy where beauty and wealth determine marriage prospects; clerks versus distinguished society
social_world.quote: She had no dowry, no expectations, no means of being known, understood, loved, wedded, by any rich

media_and_audience.value: Stories presented as curated collection of 'World's Best Mystery' - institutional literary authority packaging
media_and_audience.quote: Edited by Julian Hawthorne Library of the World's Best Mystery and Detective Stories

investigator_wound.value: Castanier's rough social origins and inability to fit in society driving his criminal desperation
investigator_wound.quote: The old dragoon was too rough and homely to make his way in society

_meta.title: ebook edited by julian hawthorne library of the world 039 s best mystery and detective stories
